name: Chunky Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chilled unsalted butter, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder.
3. Add vanilla extract and almond extract, stirring until well combined.
4. Gradually add the butter chunks, mixing with your hands until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Press the dough firmly into the bottom of a 9 by 13-inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly golden.
7. Meanwhile, melt 1 cup of chocolate chips in a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water (double boiler method). Stir constantly until smooth.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract and almond extract.
9. Pour the melted chocolate evenly over the crust.
10. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips and chopped pecans on top.
11. Press down gently to ensure everything is covered.
12. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until set.
13. Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan before cutting into desired shapes. Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
